channel.title: AI News Daily 播客
channel.description: Chinese-language narration of the AI News Daily brief: curated signal from OpenAI, Anthropic, Karpathy, Simon Willison and the wider AI engineering community. One episode per day, ~10–40 minutes.
channel.itunes:author: Pan Wang
channel.itunes:summary: Chinese-language narration of the AI News Daily brief: curated signal from OpenAI, Anthropic, Karpathy, Simon Willison and the wider AI engineering community. One episode per day, ~10–40 minutes.

item.title: 第51期｜OpenAI Full Fan Mode Contest: Terms Conditions
item.description: AI News Daily 2026-04-20 · 15 条。本期中文播客由 agentfeeds 自动生成。
